title: Generated Model Benchmarks
description: Validates config/generated/model_benchmarks.json — MACHINE-GENERATED, committed, do-not-edit-by-hand. Written by scripts/gen_model_benchmarks.py (formerly gen_model_notes.py) from a $DATA_ROOT/runs/<sweep>-* sweep. Replaces the fragile free-text `note` strings in models.json with TYPED fields. Upsert semantics: re-running updates keys present in the run, keeps keys not in it, and adds newly-seen models (never deletes). Latest-snapshot only.

_generated.description: Marker: this file is machine-owned. Do not hand-edit; rerun the generator.

generator.description: Tool + version that wrote the file (e.g. 'gen_model_benchmarks.py@<sha>').

generated_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp of the last generation.

schema_version.description: SemVer of this benchmarks schema, for migration.

models.description: Map keyed by 'provider:name' (e.g. 'ollama:qwen3:8b', 'cursor:composer-2.5'). Note the model tag itself may contain ':'.

sample_items.description: Item count N the rates are over (e.g. 27).

num_ctx.description: Context window held constant across the sweep (e.g. 16384).

etalon_meta.description: Describes the ground-truth key and how reliable it is (supports the §4 IQ redesign).

kind.description: single_key = strongest model; consensus = κ-gated agreement of K judges; human_gold = hand-adjudicated.

judges.description: provider:name of the reference models forming a consensus etalon.

kappa.description: Inter-judge agreement (Fleiss'/Cohen's κ) of the etalon (Q8).

kappa_floor.description: Minimum κ below which a cell is treated as unreliable and excluded from IQ.

model_benchmark.description: Typed per-model results for one model on one sweep. All *_pct fields are 0-100 numbers. Reliability, depth, and correctness are SEPARATE fields and MUST NOT be blended into a single rank (FR-B2, AI_MODEL_TESTS §3.5).

depth_on_success_pct.description: Mean schema-fill over completed items only (Q2). Completeness, NOT correctness.

accuracy_pct.description: (archetype+domain) match vs the etalon reference over shared completed items. Legacy/flat correctness.

iq.description: §4 redesign: difficulty-weighted accuracy over objective+rubric items in reliable (high-κ) cells (Q4). Supersedes accuracy_pct as the headline correctness number.

pref_pct.description: §4: preference win-rate on SUBJECTIVE items; reported apart, NOT folded into iq.

repeat_spread_pp.description: §4: ± spread of iq across repeats, percentage points (Q9).

warm_sec_per_item.description: sec_per_item with one-time VRAM load_duration removed.

usd_per_1k_items.description: Token-exact cloud cost per 1,000 items where the provider returns usage; 0 for local/plan.

wh_per_item.description: Measured GPU watt-hours per completed item (Q11); absent/null for cloud.

gpu.description: Aggregated GPU telemetry for this model's run (gpu-telemetry-summary/1; authoritative copy in schema/gpu_telemetry.schema.json). null = no full telemetry captured (cloud rows, or legacy rows back-filled before full capture existed).

source_runs.description: Run labels this row was aggregated from (provenance).

gpu_summary.description: Mirror of gpu-telemetry-summary/1. Every metric nullable so cloud/back-filled rows validate.
